items.name_cn:
Olive Calfskin with Cotton Linen
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality. Y always has a unique vision, winning the hearts of top fashion trends. The Y-shaped calfskin design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Extra-large capacity, fits iPads and laptops. Retro minimalist design, great for posing, stylish and photogenic!
Model: 817602
Dimensions: 38-50×33×16cm

items.name_cn:
Olive Green·
SOLFERINO BOX_19cm
A must-have hot seller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory fine toothpick grain Box cowhide, with excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, simply too fun!
Model: 634306
Size: 19x13x5cm

Olive Yellow·
SOLFERINO BOX_19cm
A best-seller that took over the entire fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Paris street Rue De Solferino, this bag features original fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag closures. It's simply too fun!

items.name_en: ONLINE ONLY Shaomai Bag #M82885# Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
ONLINE ONLY Shaomai Bag #M82885# Uninspected Version
▪️Size: 11.5*11.5*11.5cm▪️
Mini Bucket Bag Shaomai Bag Series Zjs jh Online Only Shaomai Bag, presented in modern and refined Monogram Reverse canvas. A special project designed by designer Nicolas Ghesquière to commemorate the fashion show held in Korea. The compact design evokes the Korean traditional pocket 'Fukubukuro' symbolizing good fortune. Details like the LV circle and trunk-inspired metal corners reflect the house's unique sensibility. A luxury bag suitable for both daily styling and evening wear. As a limited edition, this product is currently available for online purchase only.

items.name_en: onthego EAST WEST Series M46653 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
onthego EAST WEST Series M46653 Uninspected Version#
■ Size: 25*13*10 cm ■
A fresh take on the EAST WEST spacious layout, ready to ride the next wave of fashion!
onthego features a simple and stylish design suitable for all daily occasions, with enough space for your essentials. The compact body and five-in-one shoulder strap combo definitely makes you look youthful and full of girlish charm!
Not only has the strap been redesigned, but it also comes with a small coin pouch, making the bag shape even more dynamic!
You have to say, the designer really understands women!

items.name_cn:
OnTheGo Medium Series | CODE:M45321
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 34 x 26 x 13cm
The best choice for this season's new arrivals in the OnTheGo Medium Series.
The OnTheGo Medium bag features a leather shoulder strap design, making it look more premium and offering a better user experience. The classic Monogram pattern is designed for two-tone matching, allowing you to present a unique style at will. The tote's versatile carrying styles are a favorite among women, combining high aesthetics with excellent functionality!
